category_sources: Official ObjFW README describes a portable, lightweight framework for the Objective-C language.
source_facts.description says it is a portable lightweight framework for Objective-C.
display_name_sources: Official site, docs, and repository use ObjFW.
docs_sources: Official ObjFW docs path contains generated API reference pages, including class reference documentation.
Official repository README points users to documentation for the latest released version.
repo_sources: Official GitHub mirror describes itself as a mirror of https://git.nil.im/ObjFW/ObjFW.
source_facts.homepage redirects to the official git.nil.im ObjFW repository.
tags_sources: Official README says ObjFW supports modern Objective-C features and portability across supported platforms.
source_facts.description identifies a portable lightweight Objective-C framework.
